title: AI-PoweredEnglish Communication Skills Evaluation
text:
See which roles AI will reshape next, and what skills your workforce needs now.

Get Your Report

Home

AI-EnglishProTM

# AI-Powered 
English Communication Skills Evaluation

AI-EnglishPro™, a comprehensive and accurate assessment based on globally recognized CEFR standards, helps you build a workforce with exceptional English communication skills.

Book a demo

Capgemini

Deloitte

The United Nations

Fujitsu

The United Nations%20\(1\).webp)

## Evaluate English Proficiency

Assess and enhance your English Communication Skills, covering Listening, Speaking, Reading, and Writing

Woman with glasses and a red and black checkered shirt wearing orange headphones and looking at a laptop screen..webp)

Reading Skills

Gauge reading comprehension in specific business scenarios with grammar, lexical linking &  more 

Woman wearing glasses and a headset working on a laptop at a desk with a plant and lamp in the background..webp)

Speaking Skills

Leverage AI and evaluate oral fluency and detailed vocabulary analysis with the CEFR score

Young man wearing headphones intently looking at a laptop screen in a modern indoor setting.%20\(1\).webp)

Listening Skills

Assess listening comprehension with lexical linking, accent, tone and more 

Man wearing a white shirt and smartwatch typing on a laptop near a window with a bottle beside him..webp)

Writing Skills

Measure email writing skills, grammar and vocabulary with the CEFR score

## An AI-driven Comprehension 
‍(Context Check) for evaluating English Communication Skills

Ensure precise, on-topic candidate responses with our AI-driven evaluation, eliminating irrelevant answers and enhancing the accuracy of assessments for better hiring decisions.

AI Content Report with the percentage of digression

## Unlock the power of 
Flexibility and Reliability

With iMocha's AI-EnglishPro, offering a comprehensive English Communication Skills Assessment

English Speaking Test (Incorporating CEFR Guidelines) 

Used by HR professionals to evaluate spoken English skills for recruiting, training & development, and promotional programs. Perfect for customer-facing roles as it can test comprehension, fluency, vocabulary, and pronunciation. English Writing Test  (Incorporating CEFR Guidelines)  

Used by companies and BPO’s to evaluate candidates' written English skills. Suitable for new hires and employees who specialize in note-taking, summarizing, and email communication. English Listening Comprehension Test 

Used by HR professionals to evaluate spoken English skills for recruiting, training & development, and promotional programs. Perfect for customer-facing roles as it can test comprehension, fluency, vocabulary, and pronunciation. 

English Reading Comprehension Test 

 Used by companies and BPOs to evaluate the English proficiency of new hires and employees. Ideal for customer-facing roles that require extensive reading or complex data processing.

LSRW English Test

Used by companies and BPO providers to assess listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills in new hires and employees, with customizable options available.

Purple speaker icon indicating volume or sound..webp)

English Speaking Test (Incorporating CEFR Guidelines) 

Used by HR professionals to evaluate spoken English skills for recruiting, training & development, and promotional programs. Perfect for customer-facing roles as it can test comprehension, fluency, vocabulary, and pronunciation. 

You can now,

* Evaluate candidates' nuances of speech using the intelligent voice assessment tool.
* Test candidates' speaking and listening skills for Pronunciation, Fluency, Grammar, and Listening Comprehension. 
* Use Pronunciation Assessment Flags to create a learning path based on timestamps in the input audio. 
* Utilize evaluation methodology as it incorporates CEFR guidelines. 

**Report parameters:**Vocabulary,Grammar, Phonological Control,Comprehension (Topic) & Fluency

**Skills assessed:**Spoken English 

**Test length:**15-20 minutes

Read more.pdf)

Purple document icon with a pencil symbolizing writing or editing..webp)

English Writing Test  (Incorporating CEFR Guidelines) 

Used by companies and BPO’s  to evaluate candidates' written English skills. Suitable for new hires and employees who specialize in note-taking, summarizing, and email communication. 

You can now,

* Evaluate the candidates' ability for essay writing, email writing and text summary. 
* Assess the candidates' ability to express their ideas and thoughts on various topics, such as business and technology, as well as handling workplace situations. 
* Use the auto-evaluated tool to check for grammar, spelling, and vocabulary. 
* Identify the candidates' readability for written text through indicators. 
* Utilize evaluation methodology as it incorporates CEFR guidelines. 

**Report parameters:**: Vocabulary, Grammar, Comprehension (Topic), Orthographic Control, Coherence & Cohesion & Thematic Development

**Skills assessed:**Written English 

**Test length:**30-35 minutes 

Read more.pdf)

Purple square icon with white stylized headphones and a bar below.

English Listening Comprehension Test 

Used by companies and BPO’s to evaluate candidates' written English skills. Suitable for new hires and employees who specialize in note-taking, summarizing, and email communication.  

You can now,

* Evaluate the candidates' ability to listen to audio files by comprehending the messages and answering questions based on them. 
* Assess the candidates' ability to understand British and US accent audio and interpret information/facts correctly. 
* Assess the candidate's understanding of a specific story through Story Retelling. 

**Report parameters:**Verbal Ability, Vocabulary, Fluency

**Skills assessed:**English Listening Comprehension, English Speaking and Written English

**Test length:**30-35 minutes / 10-15 minutes

Two overlapping stylized books or documents in purple and blue tones..webp)

English Reading Comprehension Test 

Used by companies and BPOs to evaluate the English proficiency of new hires and employees. Ideal for customer-facing roles that require extensive reading or complex data processing.

You can now,

* Measure the candidates’ ability to read and identify relevant information from a passage of written information. 
* Test comprehension, vocabulary, and pronunciation skills using comprehension passages of varying lengths and complexity. 
* Analyze the candidates’ ability to comprehend and process complex information. 
* Effortlessly improve the recruitment process through more objective decision-making. 

**Report parameters:**Vocabulary, Grammar, Reading Aptitude & Verbal Ability  

**Skills assessed:**Perusal English 

**Test length:**15-20 minutes 

Abstract geometric design with overlapping blue and gray shapes on a white background.

LSRW English Test

Used by companies and BPO providers to assess listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills in new hires and employees, with customizable options available.

You can now,

* Evaluate candidates' nuances of speech using the intelligent voice assessment tool.
* Test candidates' speaking and listening skills for Pronunciation, Fluency, Grammar, and Listening Comprehension.
* Assess the candidates' ability to express their ideas and thoughts on various topics, such as business and technology, as well as handling workplace situations.
* Identify the candidates' readability for written text through indicators.
* Utilize evaluation methodology as it incorporates CEFR guidelines.

**Report parameters:**Speaking, Listening, Reading & Writing

**Skills assessed:**English Language

**Test length:**40 minutes

## Hire and Upskill with iMocha's AI-EnglishPro a comprehensive English Communication Skills Assessment

English Communication Skills are indispensable, particularly in customer-facing roles. This need extends across sectors like BFSI, Telcom, IT & ITES, BPO, Non-Profit Organizations and numerous others, emphasizing the universal requirement for strong workplace English communication skills.

BPO Hiring

Campus Hiring

Lateral Hiring

Upskilling & Redeployment  

### Identify Skill Gaps

by hiring and upskilling your BPO talent's English communication skills. Empower your VNA trainers by incorporating CEFR guidelines and discover a proactive approach to talent optimization in voice process roles.

Two people focused on working on laptops at a table in a modern indoor setting.%20\(1\).webp)

### Optimize Campus Recruitment

by conducting mass assessments for campus hiring drives. Use CEFR guidelines to screen and shortlist candidates at scale based on their English communication skills.

Two young men walking down outdoor steps, smiling and holding laptops, with backpacks on..webp)

### Accelerate the hiring process

and gain a competitive advantage by using CEFR guidelines to hire talent with excellent English communication skills for critical customer-facing roles.

Two people wearing glasses working together using a laptop in an office with wooden shelves in the background..webp)

### Develop a skills-ready workforce

by benchmarking English proficiency levels across your organization using CEFR guidelines, facilitating internal mobility and career growth for your talent.

Two young women sitting at a wooden table working together on a laptop and a tablet in a bright room..webp)

## Reliability & Validity

Embark on an innovative journey with AI-EnglishPro, where our advanced technology, endorsed by IO Psychologists, is supported by extensive research in speech processing, linguistics, mathematical models & statistical assumptions, testing theory and latent semantic analysis.
